name: Python Version Management (pyenv)
description: Installs pyenv for managing multiple Python versions in your development container

defaultPythonVersion.description: Specify Python version to install (e.g., '3.11.5'). Priority: .python-version file → defaultPythonVersion option → latest LTS version.

autoCreateVirtualenv.description: Automatically create and activate a virtual environment using pyenv-virtualenv.

virtualenvName.description: Name for the virtual environment. If empty, auto-generates based on project/Python version (e.g., 'myapp-py311').
